description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house surrounded by a lush green lawn and a perimeter of evenly spaced trees. The structure features a flat roof, large windows, and multiple balconies with awnings, providing ample outdoor living space. The front yard includes a staircase leading up to a raised terrace, with landscaped greenery and a palm tree accenting the entrance. The rear and side views reveal additional outdoor seating areas and a spacious backyard, ideal for recreation or gatherings. The house is predominantly white with clean, geometric lines and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing a contemporary architectural style. The property is enclosed by a dense line of trees, offering privacy and a natural boundary.
description: A modern, multi-story white house with flat roofs, large windows, balconies, and a tree-lined yard. The design is clean and contemporary, with landscaped outdoor spaces and privacy provided by surrounding trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, staircase, raised terrace, and dense tree boundary.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting balconies with awnings, large windows, and the spacious backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned back wall, garage entrance, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible terrace, palm tree, and continuation of the tree-lined perimeter.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a staircase, raised terrace, and minimalistic door with no porch or columns, accented by landscaping.
